title: Lead Ore and Crafts
description: Add lead ores in the minecraft world and their craftings
body:
# Lead Ores and Crafts

Add Lead ores in the minecraft world and their craftings

## This mod adds:
- Items (Lead Ingot, Raw Lead, Lead Nugget)
- Tools (Lead Sword, Lead Pickaxe, Lead Axe, Lead Shovel, Lead Hoe)
- Blocks (Raw Lead Block, Lead Block, Lead ore Block)
- Armor (Lead Helmet, Lead Chestplate, Lead Leggings, Lead Boots)

## Compatible with Other Mods (Compatible Tags)

### Languages:
- English (en_us)
- Spanish (es_us, es_es, es_mx, es_ec, es_ve, es_uy)
- Portuguese (pt_br, pt_pt)
- Chinese (zh_cn)
- Russian (ru_ru)

Translated by AI
